description.value:
One talphi saying states that life is better in motion, and many talphis are better in motion as well; it takes you a second to get up to speed, but your body is built to capitalize on the momentum you generate. The more you move, the faster you go. Your Speed increases by 5 feet until the beginning of your next turn after each action you spend to Stride.

@UUID[Compendium.sf2e.feat-effects.Item.Effect: Head of Steam]
